Localization.Description: Files executed on OS boot were changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed files executed on OS boot on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed file {object.fullpath} executed on OS boot on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed files executed on OS boot on host {event_src.host}
Files executed on OS boot were changed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed file {object.fullpath} executed on OS boot on host {event_src.host}
File {object.fullpath} executed on OS boot was changed on host {event_src.host}
